code:
---
title: Sequence Diagram - Server Credential Definition Management
config:
  theme: base
---
%% QuantumZero UML palette note: actors/external=#fff7e6/#b45309, system/component=#e0f2fe/#075985, datastore=#ecfccb/#4d7c0f, notes=#fff9c4/#d97706. Aligns diagrams to Deliverable 1 UML/DFD theme.
%% Implements: QuantumZero-server/services/admin-api/src/handlers.rs (Infra_RedisCache)
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  actor Admin as Admin User (Infra_EtcdCluster)
  participant API as Admin API
  participant DB as PostgreSQL

  Admin->>API: GET /api/v1/credential-definitions
  activate API
  API->>DB: SELECT credential_definitions ORDER BY created_at DESC
  activate DB
  DB-->>API: credential definition list
  deactivate DB
  API-->>Admin: 200 OK
  deactivate API

  Admin->>API: POST /api/v1/credential-definitions (Infra_WorkerNode)
  activate API
  API->>DB: INSERT credential_definitions (Infra_LoadBalancer)
  activate DB
  DB-->>API: credential definition row
  deactivate DB
  API-->>Admin: 201 Created
  deactivate API
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为QuantumZero的server模块画一个时序图，展示管理员如何管理凭证定义。主要涉及Admin User、Admin API和PostgreSQL这三个核心部分。Admin User属于Infra_EtcdCluster角色，Admin API会用到Infra_RedisCache的实现。
明白，我理解为管理员通过Admin API操作PostgreSQL中的credential_definitions表。需要包含哪些具体操作？是查询和创建都要吗？
对，两个核心操作：一个是GET请求获取凭证定义列表，按created_at倒序排列；另一个是POST请求创建新的凭证定义。POST操作需要经过Infra_LoadBalancer，实际执行在Infra_WorkerNode上。
好的，我先画出基础结构：actor Admin作为Admin User (Infra_EtcdCluster)，participant API作为Admin API，participant DB作为PostgreSQL。然后添加第一个GET流程——Admin调用API，API执行SELECT查询，DB返回列表，最后API返回200 OK。
GET流程没问题。POST流程注意一下：Admin发起POST到API后，API向DB执行INSERT操作，这里要标注经过Infra_LoadBalancer。DB返回新创建的行数据，API最终返回201 Created。
已添加POST流程，包含activate/deactivate的生命线控制。我注意到两个操作都涉及API和DB的激活状态，已经用autonumber标注了步骤序号。还需要补充什么细节吗？
检查一下：GET的SELECT语句要显式写出ORDER BY created_at DESC，这是业务需求。另外整个图需要符合QuantumZero的UML配色规范——actors用#fff7e6/#b45309，system用#e0f2fe/#075985，datastore用#ecfccb/#4d7c0f。
已确认：SELECT credential_definitions ORDER BY created_at DESC，配色方案已按QuantumZero规范设置，标题为"Sequence Diagram - Server Credential Definition Management"，并标注了对齐Deliverable 1 UML/DFD主题。图已完成。
elements_involved: SELECT credential_definitions ORDER BY created_at DESC
Sequence Diagram - Server Credential Definition Management
